description: MUST-NORMALIZE (issue #199): the document arrives with a single PENDING (status=unresolved) counterparty tracked-change insertion/deletion pair affecting clause text -- this is the flagship counterparty-markup scenario, the primary use case. Documented rule (post-#199): a lone pending tracked change from one author IS the proposal under review -- normalization ACCEPTS-ALL the pending revision into the operative draft and records the disposition in a normalization note; it does not fail closed. (Prior to #199 this fixture asserted the opposite -- fail closed on any unresolved change -- which made the flagship scenario yield nothing by design.)

paragraphs.heading: Limitation on Liability
paragraphs.text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000.

revisions.author: counterparty
revisions.original_text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed $150,000.
revisions.resulting_text: Each party's liability under this Agreement shall be uncapped.
